title: Dashboard
subtitle: Business performance overview
noVehiclesAlert: No vehicles registered. Add vehicles to see statistics.

stats.vehiclesWithoutCostHint: These vehicles are excluded from Cost of Sales. Complete their acquisition cost so the margin is accurate.

tooltips.totalSales: Sum of sale prices of all vehicles sold in the selected period.
tooltips.totalExpenses: Total cost of vehicles sold in the period: what you paid for each vehicle (purchase if owned, payment to consignor if consigned) plus direct expenses associated with that vehicle (preparation, transport, repairs).
tooltips.grossMargin: Direct profit from selling vehicles: Sales − Cost of Sales. Does not include seller commissions or general business expenses.
tooltips.netMargin: Gross Margin minus seller commissions and operational business expenses (rent, salaries, etc.).
tooltips.sellerCommissions: Sum of commissions paid to sellers for sales in the period.
tooltips.operationalExpenses: Expenses not attributable to a specific vehicle (fixed expenses prorated to the period).
tooltips.totalVisits: Total number of visits recorded on your website in the period
tooltips.inventoryValue: Total value of available stock for sale (own + consigned vehicles), valued at acquisition cost.
tooltips.totalVehicles: Total number of vehicles currently in your inventory
tooltips.publishedVehicles: Vehicles that are visible and available on your website
tooltips.commissions: Sum of commissions paid to salespeople for the period's sales.
tooltips.totalNetProfit: Real profit per sold vehicle. Owned: Sale − Purchase − Expenses. Consigned: the dealership's retained gain (margin over the guaranteed price, or the agreed commission) − Expenses.
tooltips.vehiclesSold: Number of vehicles sold with approved sales in the selected period
tooltips.newLeads: Number of new leads generated in the selected period
tooltips.closingRate: Conversion rate from leads to sales: (Sales / Leads) × 100
tooltips.avgDaysInStock: Average number of days that active vehicles have been in inventory since creation

fixedExpenses.title: Fixed Monthly Expenses
fixedExpenses.hint: Add expenses like rent, staff, etc.

salesSummary.title: Sales Summary
salesSummary.noSales: No sales recorded in this period
salesSummary.name: Name
salesSummary.exportSuccessDesc: The Excel file has been downloaded successfully
salesSummary.documentNotFoundDesc: No sale document exists for this transaction
salesSummary.errorOpeningDocument: An error occurred while opening the document

smartAlerts.title: Alerts
smartAlerts.liquidate: **{{names}}**{{extra}} have been +{{days}} days — consider liquidating or reducing price
smartAlerts.oldStock: **{{count}}** {{vehicleWord}} with over 90 days in stock (average **{{avg}} days**)
smartAlerts.unpublished: **{{n}}** {{vehicleWord}} unpublished ({{pct}}% of inventory) — not visible on the web
smartAlerts.noPhoto: **{{n}}** active {{vehicleWord}} without photos — hinders online sales
smartAlerts.pendingLeads: **{{n}}** uncontacted {{leadWord}} — every hour without response reduces conversion
smartAlerts.lowTurnover: Low inventory turnover: **{{rate}}x annual** — inventory is slow to sell
smartAlerts.recFastBrand: **{{brand}}** is the fastest selling brand: **{{days}} days** average
smartAlerts.recClosingRateLow: Low closing rate: **{{pct}}%** — review lead follow-up and initial response
smartAlerts.recClosingRateUp: Closing rate improved **{{improvement}}%** compared to previous period — great job
smartAlerts.recSlowBrand: **{{brand}}** takes **{{days}} days** to sell — consider adjusting prices or reducing stock
